title: Way More FPS
description: Includes fps optimization mods and quality of life improvements
body:
Modpack includes fps optimizations.  
I got around 200-300fps on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/version/6.6.0-alpha.7-mr.1), while on here i get around 1000fps.  
Also includes a mod allowing to host worlds without portforwarding.
